payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current memory matching Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered because it is superseded, so it should not be surfaced as a current fact.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory matching Sam from Goldman; mem_old was excluded because it has been superseded and should not be presented as current.

entity_resolution.reason: The query context refers to Sam from Goldman. Among matching memories, mem_new is current while mem_old is marked superseded, so mem_new is the valid recall target.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was selected as the active memory for Sam from Goldman.
mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded by a newer memory and is not current.

details: Did not present the superseded mem_old as current.

repair_options: If mem_old was incorrectly marked superseded, remove or revise its supersession metadata.
If mem_new is incorrect, update it or create a correcting memory that supersedes mem_new.
If both memories refer to different people named Sam, split or disambiguate the entity records.
